Usage:
  circleci orb publish increment <path> <ns>/<orb> major|minor|patch [flags]

Examples:
# Increment patch version and publish
$ circleci orb publish increment orb.yml myorg/my-orb patch

# Increment minor version
$ circleci orb publish increment orb.yml myorg/my-orb minor

# Read orb from stdin, increment major
$ cat orb.yml | circleci orb publish increment - myorg/my-orb major


Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected
